properties.name: promptshield.config-source
properties.description: Path to the rules JSON file. Accepts: "classpath:/rules.json", "/absolute/path.json", "https://..." Leave blank to use the bundled defaults.

properties.name: promptshield.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the library entirely.

properties.name: promptshield.hot-reload-interval
properties.description: Reload rules every N seconds (0 = disabled).

properties.name: promptshield.injection-threshold
properties.description: Score threshold above which a prompt is classified as INJECTION.
